requirement: Provide autocomplete to reduce keystrokes
exact_text_quote: To have an autocomplete or reduce the amount of keystrokes I make.

requirement: Help developers finish programming tasks faster
exact_text_quote: To finish my programming tasks faster.

requirement: Provide offline recall of code snippets, syntax, and API calls so users need not go online
exact_text_quote: To skip needing to go online to find specific code snippets, programming syntax, or API calls I’m aware of, but can’t remember.

requirement: Allow users to control the tool to generate desired output
exact_text_quote: I have trouble controlling the tool to generate code that I find useful.

requirement: Generated code must meet required functional and non-functional constraints (e.g., security, performance)
exact_text_quote: Code generation tools write code that doesn’t meet functional or non-functional (e.g., security, performance) requirements that I need.

requirement: Explain which parts of the input (code or comments) influenced a suggestion
exact_text_quote: I don’t know what part of my code or comments the code generation tool is using to make suggestions.

requirement: Accept user feedback to learn from corrections and personalize behavior
exact_text_quote: User feedback (52×). Most frequently, participants wanted to provide feedback to the AI programming assistant for it to learn from.

requirement: Avoid producing code that infringes on intellectual property
exact_text_quote: Code generation tools produce code that infringe on intellectual property.

requirement: Protect users' code privacy and control access to their code
exact_text_quote: Code generation tools have access to my code.

requirement: Leverage broader code context (e.g., other workspace files) to improve suggestions
exact_text_quote: context from other files on the same workspace

requirement: Provide provenance and links (e.g., snippet link, license, author) and link to documentation for suggestions
exact_text_quote: These tools must show where the code snippet comes from and include the code link of snippet, license, author name if available for better references for that specific code.

requirement: Offer multiple alternative suggestions for a given request
exact_text_quote: Maybe multiple suggestions and then I pick the best.

requirement: Ensure outputted code is complete, resembles the input, and is runnable/testable (add extra checks)
exact_text_quote: Add extra checks to outputted code to ensure it resembles the input given and that the outputted code is complete and can be run. Often the outputted code that I am given is incomplete, lacks the ability to run or [be] tested immediately.

requirement: Provide configurable suggestion verbosity and adjustable parameters (e.g., reduce suggestion frequency)
exact_text_quote: I’d like to be able to ask it to calm down sometimes instead of constantly trying to suggest random stuff.

requirement: Generate readable, not overly terse/one-line code (improve readability)
exact_text_quote: Sometimes AI suggest code [with] one lines or short hand logic, which is difficult to read and understand.

requirement: System shall be structured into three core modules: agent community, coordination layer, and environment layer.
exact_text_quote: Bio-Copilot is functionally structured into three core modules: an agent community , a coordination layer, and an e nvironment layer, as illustrated in Fig. 1b.

requirement: Each agent shall perceive environmental inputs, reason through natural language instructions, and execute actions.
exact_text_quote: The agent community forms the cognitive backbone, where each agent powered by an LLM perceives environmental inputs, reasons through natural language instructions, and executes actions.

requirement: Coordination layer shall orchestrate behaviors via task allocation, conflict resolution, and collaborative optimization.
exact_text_quote: The coordination layer, bridging agents and the environment, orchestrates behaviors through task allocation, conf lict resolution, and collaborative optimization.

requirement: Environment layer shall integrate physical and digital entities to form a dynamic closed-loop feedback context.
exact_text_quote: The environment layer integrates both physical (experts, lab devices) and digi tal (datasets, software) entities, forming a dynamic context where agent actions iteratively modify environmental states, establishing a closed-loop feedback system.

requirement: System shall divide agents into three specialized groups: coarse-level planning, fine-level planning, and action execution.
exact_text_quote: It divides agents into three specialized groups, i.e. coarse-level planning, fine-level planning, and action execution, which ensures clear responsibility demarcation and reduces redundant information exchange.

requirement: Agents shall autonomously determine when to engage human researchers using a rule- and prompt-driven approach.
exact_text_quote: The human–agent interaction mechanism employs a rule- and prompt-driven approach that enables agents to autonomously determine when to engage human researchers

requirement: System shall provide a shared interdisciplinary knowledge database that encodes methods and tool documents into an agent-intelligible format.
exact_text_quote: we established a shared knowledge database which encodes expertise from diverse fields, including various methods and tool documents, into an agent-intelligible format within Bio-Copilot

requirement: Agents shall support self-reflective learning from their own and other agents' behaviors to progressively refine decision-making and execution.
exact_text_quote: agents engage in both self-reflective learning from their own behaviors and other agents’ behaviors, progressively refining their decision-making and execution capabilities over time.

requirement: System shall decompose bioinformatics tasks into modular, hierarchical steps and formulate rules for task allocation and scheduling.
exact_text_quote: Initiated by scientific insights from LLMs, Bio-Copilot decomposes a bioinformatics task into modular, hierarchical steps and then formulates rules for task allocation and scheduling.

requirement: User input shall be processed by a coarse-level planning group to create an overall plan which is then executed step by step.
exact_text_quote: Specifically , user input is first processed by the coarse-level planning group to create an overall plan, which is then executed step by step.

requirement: Agents within groups shall be assigned distinct roles (e.g., planner, coder) and collaborate to fulfill group objectives.
exact_text_quote: agents are assigned distinct roles, such as planner and coder, and collaborate to fulfill the group’s objective.

requirement: Generated code quality shall meet multiple dimensions including accuracy, efficiency, completeness, readability, logicality, portability, maintainability, usability, reusability, robustness, security, and scalability.
exact_text_quote: The code quality evaluation assesses Bio-Copilot’s understanding of execution plans across multiple dimensions, including accuracy , efficiency , completeness, readability , logicality , portability , maintainability , usability , reusability , robustness, security , and scalability .

requirement: Task planning shall achieve clarity, technical feasibility, structurality, comprehensiveness, rational method selection, risk management, data management, scientific rigor, resource allocation, and scalability.
exact_text_quote: Task planning evaluation assesses the ability of Bio-Copilot to decompose bioinformatics tasks and formulate execution plans for clarity , technical feasibility , structurality , comprehensiveness, rationality of method selection, risk management, data management, scientific rigor, resource allocation, and scalability .

requirement: Human–agent interaction mechanism shall be user-friendly and highly real-time.
exact_text_quote: we devised a user-friendly , highly real-time human–agent interaction mechanism to alleviate the misunderstandings of agents on task prompts or context.

requirement: System shall dynamically retrieve relevant knowledge to mitigate LLM hallucinations and biases during reasoning and decision-making.
exact_text_quote: By dynamically retrieving relevant information from the knowledge base, agents formulate rational plans and generate code tailored to task-specific requirements, thereby mitigating the hallucinations and biases inherent in LLMs during reasoning and decision-making ( Fig. S2b).

requirement: Execution efficiency shall be measured and optimized across task completion rate, human–agent rounds, execution time, resource usage, self-correction rounds, and ROUGE-L score of generated codes.
exact_text_quote: The execution efficiency evaluation assesses Bio-Copilot with six quantifiable metrics, including the task completion rate, human–agent rounds, execution time, resource usage (CPU/GPU and memory usage percentage), self-correction rounds, and ROUGE-L score of generated codes.

requirement: Provide a modular architecture that includes a reinforcement learning core, fuzzy logic reasoning engine, human feedback interface, and bias detection module.
exact_text_quote: This system should be developed on: (i) modular architecture that includes a reinforcement learning (RL) core, fuzzy logic reasoning engine, human feedback interface, bias detection module;

requirement: Provide explainable AI (XAI) methods that output the rationale of the model.
exact_text_quote: (ii) explainable AI (XAI) methods to output the rationale of the model,

requirement: Support human-in-the-loop correction via human operators.
exact_text_quote: human operators for (iii) human-in-the-loop correction

requirement: Provide bias mitigation and fairness checks.
exact_text_quote: (iv) bias mitigation and fairness checks,

requirement: Provide a hybrid multi-store evaluation mechanism.
exact_text_quote: (v) a hybrid multi-store evaluation mechanism.

requirement: Combine human expertise and machine learning in a human-AI cooperative decision-making system.
exact_text_quote: propose a human-AI cooperative decision-making system in order to combine the benefits of human expertise and machine learning.

requirement: Manage data heterogeneity across channels.
exact_text_quote: unable to manage data heterogeneity across channels

requirement: Provide real-time adaptability.
exact_text_quote: real-time adaptability

requirement: Achieve decision latency below 200 ms.
exact_text_quote: decision latency below 200 ms.

requirement: Incorporate fuzzy logic smoothing as an important module.
exact_text_quote: fuzzy logic smoothing
